fullText: Rep. Eric Swalwell is facing growing pressure to vacate his congressional seat and calls to drop out of the California gubernatorial race over reports that a former staffer accused him of sexual assault and multiple others alleged sexual misconduct. https://t.co/TLqBZE8m5M
